expectations.text: identifies path-to-regexp v8 as the root cause
expectations.evidence: Summary: 'Express 5 は path-to-regexp を 0.x から 8.x に更新した'
Summary: gives both '/api/v1/{*path}' and '/api/v1/(.*)' as correct syntaxes

expectations.text: mentions this is an Express 5 breaking change
expectations.evidence: Summary frames the issue as Express 4→5 migration breaking change

expectations.text: mentions invalid patterns throw at startup in Express 5
expectations.evidence: Summary: '起動時に例外がスローされる'
